root_cause_explanation: The test suite was flaky under the race detector because async callbacks/iterators accessed shared variables and task lists without synchronization (e.g., DDL callback flags, lookup table task list, coprocessor iterator close/finish state). This PR stabilizes it by guarding shared state with mutexes and adjusting Close/finished handling to avoid concurrent races.
fix_pattern: Guard shared flags/slices and iterator lifecycle state with mutexes; avoid unsynchronized Close/finish updates in concurrent code.

evidence: files: Makefile, ddl/column_test.go, executor/new_executor_xapi.go, privilege/privileges/privileges_test.go, store/tikv/coprocessor.go, store/tikv/txn_committer.go
